title: The Worrying Whizzing Wasp
content:
The Worrying Whizzing Wasp,
    who stood on a Table, and played sweetly on a
    Flute with a Morning Cap.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Worrying Whizzing Wasp"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
